name: Pressure Cooker – Gauge Dial Radial Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="pc-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pc-arc-glow" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="600" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pc-bottom" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="pc-center-glow" cx="50%" cy="58%" r="35%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.2"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="pc-img-clip">
      <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="280"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: dark background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#pc-bg)"/>
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#pc-arc-glow)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: gauge outer rings -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="470" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="450" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.08"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="430" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="3"   opacity="0.5"  stroke-dasharray="1920 2704"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="430" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: gauge tick marks -->
  <g stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5">
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(-120 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(-90 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(-60 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(-30 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(0 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(30 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(60 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(90 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="206" transform="rotate(120 540 620)"/>
  </g>
  <g stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.25">
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(-105 540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(-75  540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(-45  540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(-15  540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(15   540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(45   540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(75   540 620)"/>
    <line x1="540" y1="176" x2="540" y2="196" transform="rotate(105  540 620)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 4: gauge needle + hub -->
  <line x1="540" y1="620" x2="230" y2="332" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="16" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="8"  fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: spec readings at dial positions -->
  <text x="118" y="358" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="118" y="392" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="44" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>

  <text x="74"  y="558" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="74"  y="592" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="44" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="74"  y="618" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_UNIT</text>

  <text x="870" y="358" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="870" y="392" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="44" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>

  <text x="948" y="558" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="956" y="592" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="44" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>
  <text x="956" y="618" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="1" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_UNIT</text>

  <text x="540" y="154" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC5_LABEL</text>
  <text x="540" y="188" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC5_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: product image circle -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="296" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"    stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="286" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="280" fill="url(#pc-center-glow)"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#pc-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="260" y="340" width="560" height="560" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <circle cx="540" cy="620" r="280" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: store name arc -->
  <path id="pc-store-arc" d="M 160,310 A 420,420 0 0,1 920,310" fill="none"/>
  <text font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="10">
    <textPath href="#pc-store-arc" startOffset="10%">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_ARC_TEXT</textPath>
  </text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: product name -->
  <text x="540" y="1008" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="88" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_WORD</text>
  <text x="540" y="1076" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="36" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: thin rule + features -->
  <line x1="60" y1="1100" x2="1020" y2="1100" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="540" y="1134" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: orange bottom band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1162" width="1080" height="188" fill="url(#pc-bottom)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1162" x2="1080" y2="1162" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- price -->
  <text x="60" y="1224" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="60" y="1316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="60" y="1344" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- vertical divider + CTA -->
  <line x1="680" y1="1178" x2="680" y2="1340" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="868" y="1230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <rect x="716" y="1254" width="308" height="64" rx="32" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  <text x="870" y="1294" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.label: Features line
PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.default: Stainless Steel  ·  Detachable Lid  ·  2-Year Warranty  ·  Induction Ready
